ability.name: Spice Addict
ability.description: Whenever you harvest spice, gain 1 less and draw a card.

leaders.name: BARON VLADIMIR HARKONNEN

ability.name: Masterstroke
ability.description: When you deploy 4+ troops to the Conflict in a turn, choose 2 Factions and gain 1 Influence with each.

leaders.signetRingText: Pay 1 Solari to gain 1 Intrigue card.

leaders.name: Glossu "The Beast" Rabban

ability.name: Arrakis Fiefdom
ability.description: Start the game with additional resources: 1 Spice, 1 Solari.

leaders.signetRingText: Gain 1 Troop OR 2 Troops if you have at least one Faction Alliance.

ability.name: Ruthless Negotiator
ability.description: Whenever you pay Solari for the cost of a board space: Draw 1 card.

leaders.name: Duke Leto Atreides

ability.name: Landsraad popularity
ability.description: Sending an Agent to a Landsraad board space costs you 1 Solari less.

leaders.signetRingText: Spend 1 Spice: Gain 1 Influence with a Faction where an opponent has more Influence than you.

leaders.name: Helena Richese

ability.name: Eyes Everywhere
ability.description: Enemy Agents don't block your Agents at Landsraad or City board spaces.

leaders.signetRingText: Remove and replace a card in the Imperium Row. During your Reveal turn this round, you may acquire the removed card for 1 Persuasion less.

ability.name: Connections
ability.description: When you take a High Council seat: Gain 1 Influence.

ability.name: Prescience
ability.description: You may look at the top card of your deck at any time.

leaders.name: Prince Rhombur Vernius

ability.name: Ixian Royalty
ability.description: Your dreadnoughts have a strength of 4 instead of 3.

leaders.signetRingText: Buy 1 tech, or add 1 tech negotiator.

ability.name: Intelligence
ability.description: Game start: look at the top 2 Intrigue cards, keep one (once per game).

ability.name: Spice Royalty
ability.description: You start with no water. When you gain Solari on your turn, increase the amount by 1.

leaders.name: Archduke Armand Ecaz

ability.name: Houses' Confidence
ability.description: If you have at least 2 agents on Yellow/Blue/Green spaces upon reveal, you may trash 1 card in play.

leaders.signetRingText: You may acquire a card that costs 3 or less.

ability.name: Hidden Pact
ability.description: Round start: set a card aside. When played on your 2nd turn: +1 Solari, or if only 1 agent icon +1 spice.

leaders.name: Tessia Vernius

ability.name: Subtle Subterfuge
ability.description: Place snooper tokens on influence tracks.

leaders.signetRingText: −1 influence (choose) → +1 influence with a faction where you have a snooper token.
